channel.title: AI News - Multi-Sources
channel.description: Actualités fusionnées de plusieurs entreprises IA leaders

item.description: Agents for financial services

item.description: Higher usage limits for Claude and a compute deal with SpaceX

item.title: [Anthropic News] Introducing Claude for Small Business
item.description: Introducing Claude for Small Business

item.title: [Anthropic News] PwC is deploying Claude to build technology, execute deals, and reinvent enterprise functions for clients
item.description: PwC is deploying Claude to build technology, execute deals, and reinvent enterprise functions for clients

item.title: [Anthropic News] Anthropic forms $200 million partnership with the Gates Foundation
item.description: Anthropic forms $200 million partnership with the Gates Foundation

item.title: [Mistral AI - News & Updates] Rails testing on autopilot: Building an agent that writes what developers won't
item.description: Rails testing on autopilot: Building an agent that writes what developers won't

item.title: [Mistral AI - News & Updates] Leanstral: Open-Source foundation for trustworthy vibe-coding
item.description: First open-source code agent for Lean 4.

item.title: [Mistral AI - News & Updates] Mistral AI partners with NVIDIA to accelerate open frontier models
item.description: As a founding member of the NVIDIA Nemotron Coalition, Mistral AI is contributing large-scale model development and multimodal capabilities.

item.title: [Mistral AI - News & Updates] Introducing Mistral Small 4
item.description: Introducing Mistral Small 4

item.title: [Mistral AI - News & Updates] Introducing Forge
item.description: Today, we’re introducing Forge, a system that allows enterprises to build frontier-grade AI models grounded in their proprietary knowledge.

item.title: [Mistral AI - News & Updates] Speaking of Voxtral
item.description: Voxtral TTS: A frontier, open-weights text-to-speech model that’s fast, instantly adaptable, and produces lifelike speech for voice agents.

item.title: [Mistral AI - News & Updates] Connect the dots: Build with built-in and custom MCPs in Studio
item.description: Connect enterprise data to your AI applications with reusable connectors, direct tool calling, and human-in-the-loop approval controls.

item.title: [Mistral AI - News & Updates] Workflows for work that runs the business
item.description: Workflows is now in public preview.

item.title: [Mistral AI - News & Updates] Remote agents in Vibe. Powered by Mistral Medium 3.5.
item.description: Introducing Mistral Medium 3.5, remote coding agents in Vibe, plus new Work mode in Le Chat for complex tasks.

item.title: [Mistral AI - News & Updates] Remote agents in Vibe. Powered by Mistral Medium 3.5.
item.description: Introducing Mistral Medium 3.5, remote coding agents in Vibe, plus new Work mode in Le Chat for complex tasks.

item.title: [Anthropic News] Claude is a space to think
item.description: We’ve made a choice: Claude will remain ad-free. We explain why advertising incentives are incompatible with a genuinely helpful AI assistant, and how we plan to expand access without compromising user trust.

item.title: [Anthropic News] Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs
item.description: Today, we’re launching Claude Design, a new Anthropic Labs product that lets you collaborate with Claude to create polished visual work like designs, prototypes, slides, one-pagers, and more.

item.title: [Anthropic News] Introducing Claude Opus 4.7
item.description: Our latest Opus model brings stronger performance across coding, agents, vision, and multi-step tasks, with greater thoroughness and consistency on the work that matters most.
